titleStmt.title: SII 16.155: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 155. (A.R. No. 60 of 1915.) CHINNA-AHŌBALAM, SIRVEL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the main shrine in the Narasiṁhasvāmin temple.
This is dated, Śaka 1468, Parābhava, corresponding to 1546 A.D. The details of the date are lost.

The inscription is damaged and fragmentary. It seems to record a provision made for certain offerings to the deity on some specified occasion out of the proceeds of a village obtained by him from king Achyutarāya and endowed for the purpose of the offerings by the son (name lost) of Bhūtanātha Brahmā-Jyōyisa of Āśvalāyanasūtra and Ṛik-śākha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarusaṁbulu 1468 Agunēṭi parā bhava pa śrī vīra satāsiva dēvamahārā yalu vidyānaHere and in the following lines the
garamaṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulaiyi pṛtivīsāṁmrājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu svastiśrī caturdaśa bhu ku
Āsvalāyanasūtraṁ rukhuśākhādhyāyulayina bhūtanādhu brahmajyōyyuśu komā ruṁḍu rā ccina polivūṭu dharmaśāsana krama
meṭlaṁnnanu pratāpa kaṭṭa kunu sukhiyala polivūṭuku māku Acyutadēvamahā marpiṁcci yiṁduku dēvuṁḍutiru pa
nāḷalu vēṁcēsē dipasālaku maṁḍapāna Āragiṁca kaṭaḍa sēsina sukhiyalapaḍiki sukhiyyalu sukhiyalapaḍi Āragiṁppa kaṭṭaḍa sēsi
dēvaraku samarpiṁcci yiccina grāmaṁ Ācaṁdrārkasthāyigānu naḍapaṁgala The record stops
Digital edition of SII 16.155 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
